title: Tao Te Ching 51
source: Mawangdui silk manuscripts; Guodian bamboo slips
description: Chapter 51 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.
introduction: Chapter 51 of the Tao Te Ching by Laozi.

translation.text: The Tao gives birth to them. Virtue nourishes them. Matter shapes them. Environment completes them.
